desc: Necessary condition. If any check fails, the project fails Client verification and the score is void.

checks.desc: App fulfills the assigned domain task (solves the actual problem, not a lookalike)
AI tools / algorithms process the problem correctly and logically
Outputs are substantively correct and sensible on real inputs
Core business function is genuinely working end-to-end (not mocked/hard-coded)
Concrete user persona defined
Sharp, real problem statement
MVP scope is tight; core flow mapped, no scope creep
Process artifacts present (Design Thinking / BPMN / Event Storming / Kanban)
MVP delivers the core user flow end-to-end
Coherent, usable UI; clear information hierarchy
Design-system consistency (tokens, components, spacing)
Accessibility: keyboard nav, focus states, semantic HTML/ARIA
Color contrast meets WCAG AA
Responsive across breakpoints
Modern Angular with signals and current patterns
Nx monorepo structure (apps + libs, clear boundaries)
Clean component architecture, smart/dumb split, state mgmt
Effective debugging/observability (e.g. Chrome DevTools MCP)
ng-diagram (or equivalent) used meaningfully, not decoratively
NestJS backend wired to the Angular frontend
SQL + Sequelize + Docker data layer working
Sound architecture: layering, DI, error handling, config
LLM (Gemini) integration functioning in the product
Evaluation scoreboard and/or autonomous agentic loop for AI quality
Deployed live and reachable on Google Cloud Run
CI/CD pipeline (Cloud Build / Artifact Registry)
MCP server built and/or integrated
Scalability: stateless services, managed Cloud SQL
Performance optimization (bundle, caching, cold-start)

desc: Not in the 100 pts, but the panel judges as Client + Investor — this decides ties and framing.

checks.desc: Business value and target market are explicit
Story arc: problem -> solution -> working product -> market
Demo explicitly touches all 5 pillars
Clear ask / next step for the 'investor'

desc: A live product that crashes loses Criterion Zero credibility.

checks.desc: Runs live without crashes on the happy path
Seeded/realistic data available for the demo
Graceful fallback if the LLM/API is slow or fails

desc: Test-case-driven measurement of the AI's substantive correctness feeding c0.3.

checks.desc: A test set of representative inputs with expected/acceptable outputs exists
Automated pass-rate measured (LLM-judge or assertions)
Known failure modes documented and mitigated
